deltas.releaseNoteText: New prop: visibilityOptionDropdown (boolean, default false). New API methods: enableVisibilityOptionDropdown(), disableVisibilityOptionDropdown(). New event: visibilityOptionClicked → VisibilityOptionClickedEvent. Allows users to set comment visibility to 'public' or 'private' before submitting.
deltas.summary: Create a new rule documenting the visibility option dropdown prop, its enable/disable API methods, and the visibilityOptionClicked event that fires when the user selects public or private before submitting a comment.

details.signature:
visibilityOptionDropdown: boolean (default: false)
enableVisibilityOptionDropdown(): void
disableVisibilityOptionDropdown(): void
visibilityOptionClicked: VisibilityOptionClickedEvent

parameters.name: visibilityOptionDropdown
parameters.description: Prop on VeltComments that shows or hides the visibility dropdown in the comment composer.

deltas.summary: Add VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityDropdown and its seven sub-components to the Dialog Components list and include a usage example block.
